top_diagnosis.symptom_pattern: chest pain, shortness of breath, sweating
top_diagnosis.red_flags: Severe chest pain, radiating to arm/jaw, sweating, nausea, or shortness of breath
top_diagnosis.recommended_tests: ECG, troponin blood test, chest X-ray
top_diagnosis.advice: Seek emergency care immediately. Do not ignore or self-medicate.

matches.symptom_pattern: chest pain, shortness of breath, sweating
matches.red_flags: Severe chest pain, radiating to arm/jaw, sweating, nausea, or shortness of breath
matches.recommended_tests: ECG, troponin blood test, chest X-ray
matches.advice: Seek emergency care immediately. Do not ignore or self-medicate.

matches.symptom_pattern: lower back pain after lifting, no leg weakness or numbness
matches.red_flags: Weakness, numbness, loss of bladder or bowel control
matches.recommended_tests: Physical exam, X-ray if persistent, MRI if neurological signs
matches.advice: Rest, posture correction, and medical review if pain persists.

matches.symptom_pattern: fever, cough, sore throat, body ache
matches.red_flags: Persistent high fever > 3 days, difficulty breathing, confusion, chest pain
matches.recommended_tests: Rapid flu test, CBC, chest X-ray if breathing issues
matches.advice: Hydration, rest, and fever control. See a doctor if symptoms worsen.

matches.symptom_pattern: frequent urination, extreme thirst, unexplained weight loss
matches.red_flags: Blurred vision, confusion, fruity breath smell, very high blood sugar
matches.recommended_tests: Fasting blood sugar, HbA1c, urine ketones
matches.advice: Schedule a prompt appointment with an endocrinologist.
